steps: Log in to your Lever account if prompted
Click 'Generate New Key' to create a new API key
Enter a descriptive name for the key
Select the required permissions (Read and/or specific Write permissions)
Copy the API key — it is used with HTTP Basic Auth (key as username, empty password)

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Lever API key from Settings > Integrations > API Credentials. Used as the username in HTTP Basic Auth.

notes: Requires a Lever account with API access enabled (available on paid plans)
Authentication uses HTTP Basic Auth: API key as the username, empty string as the password
Multiple keys can be created with different permission scopes
Sandbox environment available at https://api.sandbox.lever.co/v1/ for testing
Rate limit: 20 requests/second; 10 requests/second for some write endpoints
API versioning: current version is v1

test_endpoint.description: Returns all pipeline stages in the account
